variants.modifierDescription: Eximus units have a much higher spawn rate in this mission. Some of their auras stack.
Only melee weapons may be used in this mission, any other weapon type is not allowed, and will be removed automatically if equipped.
Any damage received will impart radiation effects, and so will green clouds around the tileset.

activeChallenges.desc: Kill 150 Enemies with a Radiation Damage
activeChallenges.title: Reactor
